evals.prompt: Verify the issue-definition skill's own structural integrity.
evals.expected_output: A valid skill directory with SKILL.md passing all structural checks.

assertions.text: The output includes a SKILL.md file
The frontmatter contains a valid `name` field using only lowercase letters and hyphens
The frontmatter contains a non-empty `description` field

assertions: The description is activation-oriented and says what the skill does and when to use it

assertions.text: The body includes a `## Workflow` section with ordered steps
The body includes a `## Purpose` section
The body includes a `## When to use / not use` section

assertions: The workflow covers scope, acceptance criteria, and task slices

assertions.text: The frontmatter parses as valid YAML

evals.prompt: Verify the issue-definition skill's bundled scripts.
evals.expected_output: A valid scripts/ directory with PEP 723 compliant Python scripts.

assertions.text: The classify_issue.py script has PEP 723 metadata
The classify_issue.py script does not contain input() calls

evals.prompt: Verify the issue-definition skill's referenced files exist.
evals.expected_output: All referenced support files exist at their declared paths.

assertions.text: The issue template exists at assets/issue-template.md
The issue definition process reference exists
The issue writing rules reference exists
The work type examples reference exists
